description_long: This is a rectangular carton of orange juice branded as 'aliada', featuring a predominantly white and orange color scheme. The front of the carton displays vivid images of whole and sliced oranges, along with the text 'Zumo de naranja SIN PULPA', indicating it is pulp-free orange juice. The packaging includes a white plastic screw cap on the top for pouring, and the sides of the carton show nutritional information and additional branding. The carton appears to be made of laminated cardboard, typical for juice containers, with a glossy printed exterior. The overall design is clean and modern, with clear product and brand labeling, making it easily recognizable in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular orange juice carton with a white screw cap, orange and white branding, and images of oranges on the front. The packaging is glossy and features nutritional information on the sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'aliada' brand, orange juice label, and a large image of orange slices.
description_view_1: This side view displays the nutritional information panel and part of the orange imagery, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_2: The opposite face highlights the orange slices, brand, and product label, with the white screw cap clearly visible on top.
description_view_3: This side view again shows the nutritional information panel and the cap, mirroring the opposite side.
